nasb.text: And it came about, whenever Moses went out to the tent, that all the people would arise and stand, each at the entrance of his tent, and gaze after Moses until he entered the tent.

esv.text: Whenever Moses went out to the tent, all the people would rise up, and each would stand at his tent door, and watch Moses until he had gone into the tent.

cnv.text: 摩西出營到會幕去的時候，全體的人民都起來，各人站在自己帳幕的門口，望著摩西，直到他進了會幕。

ccb.text: 当摩西离营去会幕的时候，百姓就都一同起来，各人站在自己的帐篷门口目送摩西走进会幕。
